---
title: "test_decoupling_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_decoupling_empire.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 7.80
overall_score: 4.40
---

## Intent
The `test_decoupling_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_uplink_emits_directive_in_gemini_mode, test_muninn_initialization_decoupled, test_huginn_neural_audit_decoupled. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_uplink_emits_directive_in_gemini_mode, test_muninn_initialization_decoupled, test_huginn_neural_audit_decoupled. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [json](file://json)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.huginn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.huginn)

### Exports
- `test_uplink_emits_directive_in_gemini_mode`
- `test_muninn_initialization_decoupled`
- `test_huginn_neural_audit_decoupled`
